data.title: Truecaller: Phone Call Blocker
data.description:
Truecaller: Your all-in-one solution for caller ID, call screening, call recording & spam or scam blocking.

Block spam & scams calls with Truecaller’s Caller ID. Truecaller will record, identify & block robocallers, phone fraudsters, telemarketers, scammers & other unwanted or unknown phone numbers. 

The spam detector will automatically record calls & block phone numbers to protect against fraudulent calling & SMS messages. The phone numbers on our spam list are updated & blocked in real time by millions of users worldwide. Use the reverse call lookup feature to search for unknown phone numbers in our community-based spam database. 

Powerful Auto-Dialer, Caller ID and Advanced Features:
- Get the leading caller ID app, which automatically shows who’s calling even if the caller is not in your contacts. Filter & block spam calls before you answer.
- Use Video Caller ID to record a short video that plays automatically when you call friends & family. Record a selfie video or set your Video Caller ID using our built-in templates.
- Use Voice Calling to talk to friends on Truecaller for free.
- Back up and restore call history, call logs, contacts, messages, block list & settings to Google Drive.  

Block & Detect Spam:
- Set Truecaller as your default calling app. It can manage all incoming/outgoing calls & display Caller ID regardless if the caller is in your contacts. 
- Block spam calls, scam calls, fraud, traps & robocalls alongside unwanted SMS messages. Identify & auto-block telemarketers, robocallers, scammers, fraudsters & sale calls. 
- The phone numbers on Truecaller’s blocked spam list are updated daily by millions of users worldwide, helping you avoid robocalls, fraud & spam calls. 
- Unsure if the number that texted you is a real person? Use our reverse number lookup to find their identity or Caller ID.
- Utilize Truecaller’s advanced scam shield to block spam automatically. Block callers from specific countries, phone number sequences, robocalls, unknown or no Caller ID numbers & telemarketers. 

Smart Messaging: 
- Automatically identify unknown SMS.
- Automatically block spam and telemarketing SMS 
- Organize your SMS into Personal, Other and Spam.
- Blacklist unwanted SMS senders.
- SMS and Message Translation.
- Truecaller auto-detects foreign languages & translates them with one tap.

Seamless Call Recording with Truecaller:
- Truecaller can record any incoming/outgoing calls easily.
- Auto-generated Call Subjects: For easy organization of call recordings.
- Instant Call Summary: Get caller ID contact info & recaps of call recordings.
- AI-powered Transcriptions: Receive written & searchable call transcripts.

Truecaller Premium - Upgrade and get access to:
- Ad-free experience.
- Knowing who searched & viewed your profile. 
- Advanced options to block & filter calls.
- Call Announce: Know who’s calling without looking at the phone.
- Incognito Mode: View other caller’s profiles privately. 
- Get the Premium badge on your profile.
- Get 30 contact requests per month. 

Truecaller does not upload your phonebook & does not make your phonebook public or searchable.

data.summary: Spam Call Blocker: Filter Trap Phone Calls | Reveal Caller ID & Blacklist Number
data.recentChanges:
- Meet our new lifelike AI Assistant that handles your calls naturally. Watch the conversation stream in real-time in your Assistants live chat. Now in the US, with more markets coming soon.
- Truecaller just got smarter! Now available on Wear OS, making it easier to protect yourself from spam calls right from your wrist.
- A newly redesigned block screen with extra levels of spam protection
